note: Final PD is produced by raw XGBoost probability because sigmoid calibration worsened Brier Score and ECE.
LGD is assumption-based by internal grade because recovery data is unavailable.
Required Rate = funding cost + operating cost + expected loss rate + target margin.
Expected Profit = interest income - funding cost - operating cost - expected loss.
Pricing Gap = actual interest rate - required risk-based interest rate.
Portfolio frontier simulates PD approval thresholds and compares approval rate, expected loss, and expected profit.
